backend/main.mo: Main actor for the RAY INFOTECH MLM backend, handling user profiles, member registration, MLM tree management, commission calculations, and admin operations with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades OldMember records to NewMember by adding the missing `uplineId` field (defaulting to null) while preserving all other fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (member dashboard, admin panel, self-registration, login flow) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose of each frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'RAY INFOTECH MLM' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router (routes: /, /login, /register, /dashboard, /admin), QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and an AppLayout that conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Admin form component for registering a new member with name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID fields, including real-time sponsor validation and a success state displaying the assigned member ID with a copy button.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Renders a 9-level commission breakdown table for a member, showing members at each level, commission rates, earned amounts, and max potential earnings based on a 3x matrix structure with a ₹2750 joining fee.
Displays a summary card of a member's total earned vs. potential earnings across all 9 levels, including joining fee refund status and a per-level breakdown.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Ray Infotech logo, desktop and mobile nav links (Home, Dashboard, Register Member, Admin), and login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer into a full-height page structure.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary tree of a member's downline network up to a configurable depth, displaying member cards with name, ID, active status, and fee payment status.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Fetches all members and computes platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) displayed as a grid of summary cards with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and contact info) before using the MLM platform, using React Query mutations to save the data.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: A card component that displays a member's recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active with live countdown) and progress toward recruiting 3 direct downlines within the 3-day window.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the user's identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including fetching/saving user profiles, roles, member data, and registering members via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech deep navy and gold brand theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all members in a searchable, paginated table with options to mark joining fees as paid, check membership statuses, and add new members via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Member dashboard page that displays earnings summary, commission history, matrix tree visualization, and downline breakdown by level for a selected member, with BFS-based level calculation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page showcasing the Ray Infotech MLM platform with a hero section, commission level breakdown (9% down to 1% across 9 levels), and navigation to login or dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity and redirects them to the admin panel or dashboard based on their role, or keeps guests on the login page.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration page with a form for name, mobile, email, and sponsor ID; validates inputs, looks up the sponsor, submits registration, and displays the resulting member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for handling nanosecond timestamps, computing recruitment deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based semantic colors, Ray Infotech brand colors (navy/gold), custom shadows, border radii, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for the RAY INFOTECH MLM 3×3 matrix system, documenting architecture decisions, payout rules, known build issues, and a list of already-implemented features with their requirement IDs and versions.
